---
name: Bug report
about: Something is broken or behaving unexpectedly
title: '[Bug] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug
A clear description of what went wrong.

## Command you ran
```bash
aysal-scan scan ...
```

## Expected behaviour
What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour
What actually happened. Paste terminal output here.

## Environment
- OS:
- Python version (`python --version`):
- Aysal-Scan version (`aysal-scan --version`):
- Install method: `pip install` / `pip install -e .`

## Additional context
Any other relevant information.

> ⚠️ Never include real secrets or credentials in bug reports.
